headline: Is United Parcel Service Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Despite United Parcel Service's underperformance relative to the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: UPS Targets Manufacturers With $50M Mexico Air Freight Investment
summary: As part of the project, the logistics giant is offering one-to-three day service options for manufacturers amid nearshoring and tariff-driven supply chain shifts.

raw.headline: UPS Targets Manufacturers With $50M Mexico Air Freight Investment
raw.summary: As part of the project, the logistics giant is offering one-to-three day service options for manufacturers amid nearshoring and tariff-driven supply chain shifts.

headline: UPS upgrades service level for US-Mexico industrial shippers
summary: UPS says it has invested $50M in elevating service for freight shippers that use its parcel network between Mexico and the U.S. with the introduction of guaranteed day delivery and freight-specific pricing. The post UPS upgrades service level for US-Mexico industrial shippers appeared first on FreightWaves.
